name: Tap Driver Installation - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Ian Davis, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Tap Driver Installation - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects the installation of a well-known TAP driver service. This could be a sign of potential preparation for data exfiltration using tunnelling techniques.


False positives:
- Legitimate OpenVPN TAP installation

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%tap0901%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Tap Driver Installation - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%tap0901%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Tap Driver Installation - Security
